access_policies.description: The access policies for the Elasticsearch domain, typically defined in JSON format.

advanced_options.description: A map of key-value pairs to configure advanced options for the Elasticsearch domain.

advanced_security_options.description: Security options that include enabling advanced security and internal user database.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Elasticsearch domain.

auto_tune_options.description: Configuration options for auto-tuning the Elasticsearch domain, including maintenance schedules.

cluster_config.description: Cluster configuration options, including instance types, counts, and zone awareness settings.

cognito_options.description: Cognito authentication options, defining the identity pool, user pool, and role ARN.

created.description: Indicates whether the Elasticsearch domain has been created.

deleted.description: Indicates whether the Elasticsearch domain has been deleted.

domain_id.description: The unique identifier for the Elasticsearch domain.

ebs_options.description: Configuration for EBS volumes attached to the Elasticsearch domain.

elasticsearch_version.description: The version of Elasticsearch that the domain is running.

encryption_at_rest.description: Configuration for encryption at rest, including whether it is enabled and the KMS key ID.

endpoint.description: The endpoint URL for the Elasticsearch domain.

id.description: The ID of the Elasticsearch domain.

kibana_endpoint.description: The endpoint URL for the Kibana dashboard associated with the Elasticsearch domain.

log_publishing_options.description: Options for publishing logs to CloudWatch, including log type and enabling status.

node_to_node_encryption.description: Indicates whether node-to-node encryption is enabled for the domain.

processing.description: Indicates whether the Elasticsearch domain is currently processing changes.

snapshot_options.description: Options for automated snapshots, including the start hour.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the Elasticsearch domain.

vpc_options.description: VPC configuration options for the Elasticsearch domain, including subnets and security groups.
